evidence: Dover Digital Labs consists of a team of software developers, AI engineers and scientists, automation engineers, product security engineers, and product managers who provide digital capabilities
India Innovation Center has a team of approximately 750 engineers and IT professionals that our businesses rely on to leverage for product engineering, digital solutions development
identifying and addressing scale opportunities to deploy artificial intelligence to drive productivity across our business processes

artAI is a cloud-based, AI-powered authentication tool that detects counterfeiting and supply-chain diversion. Using machine vision and machine learning, artAI creates a digital blueprint of packaging artwork
Dover Food Retail introduced a cloud-based software to digitize the full life cycle of CO2 refrigeration solutions from deployment to diagnostics, warranty management and maintenance
developing and improving acquired and organically built connected and SaaS products that combine sensors, software, machine learning and artificial intelligence
misuse or malicious use of artificial intelligence, including by criminals, nation states or insiders, our business may be adversely impacted
Emerging and evolving technologies such as artificial intelligence...our businesses may be adversely affected if we cannot successfully integrate these technologies into our business processes
misuse of artificial intelligence and machine learning technologies...could interrupt product supply and...have a material adverse impact on our business operations

limitations: No quantified dollar amounts or specific budget figures tied to AI investment were found in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 based on named teams and initiatives without quantified scale.

ai_narrative_concreteness scored 4 (deployed use cases with operating detail) but no quantified business results (%, $, time saved) were disclosed for AI-specific initiatives; score reflects deployment description without metrics.
capex_mentions is empty because no specific dollar or quantity figures for AI/compute/data-center capital expenditure appeared in the excerpts.
